name: Corner Dots pow 3
description: Dots in opposite corners with pow-3 sharpening. Sparse localized patterns to test spatial selectivity for small, well-separated features.

config.description: DOT_TL (5x5 top-left) and DOT_BR (5x5 bottom-right) with pow-3 sharpening. Maximally separated sparse patterns — if the tissue can't differentiate these, the problem is deeper than sharpening.
